basic_details.job_title: MPMKVVCL Independent Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Madhya Pradesh Madhya Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Company (MPMKVVCL)
basic_details.short_information: Madhya Pradesh Madhya Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Company (MPMKVVCL) Independent Director Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of MPMKVVCL. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the MPMKVVCL Independent Director Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Superintending Engineer/General Manager with 25 years in Power/Energy Sector, Director/Head/Dean/HOD/Professor from top 200 NIRF institution with 25 years in Energy/Power, CA/CS/CMA with 25 years experience, Valid DIN and IICA Databank registration with proficiency test, Satisfy Section 149(6) and 164 of Companies Act 2013
qualification.details: Any person from Superintending Engineer/General Manager position with at least 25 years experience in Power/Energy Sector (Distribution/Transmission/Generation) OR Director(s)/Head(s)/Dean(s)/HODs/Professors of top 200 NIRF institutions with 25 years technical background in Energy/Power OR CA/CS/CMA with 25 years experience. Must satisfy Companies Act 2013 Section 149(6) and 164. Must have a valid DIN. Must have IICA Databank registration and proficiency test. Preferably based in Bhopal.

salary_details.pay_scale: Sitting fee Rs. 10000 per Board Meeting, Rs. 5000 per Committee Meeting
salary_details.details: Sitting fee Rs. 10000 per Board Meeting, Rs. 5000 per Committee Meeting

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility Selection by Selection Committee as per Articles of Association
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: portal.mpcz.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MPMKVVCL Independent Director Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MPMKVVCL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MPMKVVCL Independent Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Any person from Superintending Engineer/General Manager position with at least 25 years experience in Power/Energy Sector (Distribution/Transmission/Generation) OR Director(s)/Head(s)/Dean(s)/HODs/Professors of top 200 NIRF institutions with 25 years technical background in Energy/Power OR CA/CS/CMA with 25 years experience. Must satisfy Companies Act 2013 Section 149(6) and 164. Must have a valid DIN. Must have IICA Databank registration and proficiency test. Preferably based in Bhopal.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Sitting fee Rs. 10000 per Board Meeting, Rs. 5000 per Committee Meeting

content_sections.heading: MPMKVVCL Independent Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on eligibility Selection by Selection Committee as per Articles of Association

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: portal.mpcz.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MPMKVVCL Independent Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MPMKVVCL Independent Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the MPMKVVCL Independent Director positions is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Independent Director post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the post of Independent Director in the Madhya Pradesh Madhya Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Company (MPMKVVCL) recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the MPMKVVCL Independent Director recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Independent Director role?
faq.answer: The qualification includes experience as Superintending Engineer/General Manager, Director/Professor from top institutions, or CA/CS/CMA, all with 25 years of relevant experience, along with specific legal compliances.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for an Independent Director at MPMKVVCL?
faq.answer: The compensation includes a sitting fee of Rs. 10000 per Board Meeting and Rs. 5000 per Committee Meeting.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Independent Director position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility criteria, followed by a final selection by a Selection Committee as per the company's Articles of Association.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of MPMKVVCL, which is portal.mpcz.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as per the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details. The provided data does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit.
